// console.log(`\n🎯 ${TESTS.length} test scenarios stored in collection variables.`);
// Generates ALL payloads for ALL tests ONCE upfront.
// UUIDs are stable across every request in the run.
// Only generate if not already done this run
meeting: { title: "Q4 Planning Sync", roomName: "lcfvaa-absxch", createdAt: "2024-12-13T06:57:09.736Z" },
{ speaker: "Alice Johnson", content: "Alright, let us get started with the Q4 planning.",           startOffset: 121, endOffset: 302 },
{ speaker: "Bob Smith",     content: "Sure. I have the revenue projections ready to share.",         startOffset: 308, endOffset: 489 },
{ speaker: "Alice Johnson", content: "Great, go ahead and walk us through the numbers.",             startOffset: 544, endOffset: 726 },
{ speaker: "Carol White",  content: "Let us kick off the retro. What went well this sprint?",            startOffset: 50,   endOffset: 230  },
{ speaker: "David Lee",    content: "The CI pipeline improvements made deployments much smoother.",       startOffset: 290,  endOffset: 510  },
{ speaker: "Eva Martinez", content: "Agreed. Though I think our story point estimates were off.",         startOffset: 560,  endOffset: 750  },
{ speaker: "Carol White",  content: "Good point. Let us add estimation accuracy to our action items.",   startOffset: 800,  endOffset: 1020 },
{ speaker: "Frank Chen", content: "Morning everyone. Quick round of updates.",                            startOffset: 10,  endOffset: 140 },
{ speaker: "Grace Kim",  content: "I am finishing the auth module today, blocked on code review.",        startOffset: 170, endOffset: 370 },
meeting: { title: "Annual Budget Review", roomName: "finance-boardx", createdAt: "2025-02-03T14:00:00.000Z" },
{ speaker: "Henry Patel", content: "We need to finalize the headcount budget by end of week.",            startOffset: 100, endOffset: 320  },
{ speaker: "Irene Novak", content: "Engineering is requesting two additional senior engineers.",           startOffset: 360, endOffset: 560  },
{ speaker: "Henry Patel", content: "Can we defer one hire to Q3 given the current burn rate?",            startOffset: 610, endOffset: 820  },
{ speaker: "Irene Novak", content: "That works. I will update the headcount plan accordingly.",           startOffset: 860, endOffset: 1060 },
meeting: { title: "Product Roadmap Review", roomName: "product-qroadm", createdAt: "2025-02-10T11:00:00.000Z" },
{ speaker: "James Wu",    content: "Let us walk through the H1 roadmap priorities.",                      startOffset: 80,   endOffset: 260  },
{ speaker: "Karen Singh", content: "Search ranking improvements should stay in the top three.",           startOffset: 310,  endOffset: 510  },
{ speaker: "Leo Torres",  content: "I agree. Our NPS data shows search is the biggest pain point.",       startOffset: 560,  endOffset: 790  },
{ speaker: "James Wu",    content: "Noted. We will move it up to priority one for H1.",                   startOffset: 830,  endOffset: 1010 },
{ speaker: "Mia Johansson", content: "Is everyone able to hear me okay?",                                 startOffset: 20,  endOffset: 160 },
{ speaker: "Nate Brown",    content: "Yes, loud and clear. Should we wait for the others?",               startOffset: 200, endOffset: 390 },
meeting: { title: "Engineering All Hands — March", roomName: "allhands-march", createdAt: "2025-03-05T10:00:00.000Z" },
{ speaker: "Olivia Grant", content: "Welcome everyone to the March all hands. Big quarter ahead.",        startOffset: 100,  endOffset: 310  },
{ speaker: "Paul Kim",     content: "Infrastructure team shipped zero-downtime deploys last week.",       startOffset: 360,  endOffset: 570  },
{ speaker: "Quinn Adler",  content: "Platform team is targeting SDK v3 GA by end of month.",             startOffset: 610,  endOffset: 820  },
{ speaker: "Rose Adams",   content: "Security audit is scheduled for the 18th. Please review your services.", startOffset: 860, endOffset: 1100 },
{ speaker: "Olivia Grant", content: "Thanks all. Reach out on Slack if you have follow up questions.",   startOffset: 1140, endOffset: 1380 },
// Build + Store ALL payloads in one shot
// ONE set of IDs per test — never regenerated
// meeting.transcript chunks — all share the same meetingId/sessionId
transcriptId:   uuidv4(),          // unique per chunk, intentionally
// Flag so subsequent requests in this run skip regeneration
console.log("\n🎯 All payloads locked in. Collection Runner is safe to go.");
